title: Securitize eyes acquisitions with $400 million war chest after going public, CEO says
summary: Following its NYSE debut, Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo said the firm wants to expand its institutional tokenization platform rather than buy competitors.

title: DeFi protocol Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after $6 million exploit
summary: The protocol’s SUMR token fell by over 18% after the incident.

title: Cantor says Strategy's recovery hinges on restoring STRC to par
summary: Bringing Strategy's preferred shares back to $100 is key to restarting Strategy's capital engine, the bank said, with repeated management actions expected to support both preferred and common shareholders.

title: Bitmine added another $74 million in ether as Tom Lee bets on Clarity Act boost
summary: The second-largest digital asset treasury increased its buying pace, while Strategy sold a chunk of its bitcoin holdings.

title: Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically ups pace of bitcoin sales, raising $216 million
summary: The company sold 3,588 bitcoin last week to replenish its dollar reserves for dividends on its preferred stock.
